title: Slavic Creation: The World Tree
description: The Slavic cosmos organized around the World Tree: its crown reaches heaven, its roots descend to the underworld.
introduction: The Slavic cosmos organized around the World Tree: its crown reaches heaven, its roots descend to the underworld.

translation.original_text: Стоит дуб от земли до неба. Корни его в преисподней, ветви его в небесех.
translation.text: An oak stands from earth to sky. Its roots are in the underworld, its branches in the heavens.
